commits.subject: docs(pwa): rewrite PWA section as complete React implementation reference
commits.body:
The PWA suggestions were prose descriptions with scattered fix sections.
Restructured into a logical implementation-order reference with concrete
React code: Vite config, usePWAUpdate hook, usePWAInstall hook (with
integrated race condition fix and diagnostic logging), component patterns,
and a key lessons summary. All examples use React patterns
(useState/useEffect/useCallback, virtual:pwa-register/react) instead of
framework-agnostic prose. Fixed maskable icon to use dedicated 1024x1024.

Tags: documentation, pwa, react
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-system
Semver: patch

commits.subject: feat(build): convert to Vite project
commits.body:
Add Vite as the build tool so this repo serves as a working reference
implementation, not just documentation. Static files move to public/,
CLAUDE.md stays at repo root (for Claude Code) and gets copied to dist/
via a small Vite plugin. Deploy workflow now runs npm ci + vite build
before uploading dist/ to GitHub Pages.

- vite.config.js with base path and copy-root-files plugin
- public/ for static assets (texts, generated icons)
- Updated generate-icons.mjs to output to public/assets/images/
- Deploy workflow adds Node 20 setup and build step

Tags: build, vite, infrastructure
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: icon-system
Semver: minor

commits.subject: feat(icons): add SVG icon source and PNG generation pipeline
commits.body:
Set up the icon generation system per Suggested Implementations. Single
SVG source (glowing document on navy background) generates all needed
PNG sizes via Sharp. Design follows maskable icon rules: square canvas,
full background, content in inner 80% safe zone, legible at 48px.

Generated sizes: 1024 (icon, adaptive, splash), 512, 192, 48 (favicon).

Tags: icons, assets, build

commits.subject: docs(pwa): add timer leak and install prompt race condition fixes to PWA guidelines
commits.body:
Two common PWA bugs documented as implementation guidelines:
1. Timer leaks on unmount — nested setTimeout callbacks survive cleanup when only
   the outer timeout is cleared. Fix: track all timeout IDs or use a mounted ref guard.
2. Install prompt race condition — beforeinstallprompt fires before SPA framework mounts
   on repeat visits. Fix: inline script in HTML captures event early, hook consumes it
   with useState initializer, useEffect fallback covers first-visit case.

Tags: documentation, pwa
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-guidelines
Semver: patch
commits.title: add timer leak and install prompt race condition fixes to PWA guidelines

fetching CLAUDE.md from GitHub Pages and writing it to

.claude/ directory automatically pull shared rules at session start.
